case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY MARC PERRY BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00
